lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I buy a beer please?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Sure, that will be 2 gold coins please.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: You don't have enough room for it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you heard any rumours here?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: No, it hasn't been very busy lately.
